verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O, dear friend in sin, O, when it's lost and dying, Every Christian has it's burden down with Care Tell me how you're doing all you can for Jesus Are you traveling up to offer the Lord your prayer.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Keeping faith in your heart and concentrate it. Every hour, everyday do you prepare Are you ready should your master call you at midnight How're you traveling up to offer the Lord your prayer

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Are you praying for those who know not Jesus After they be led through the tempest snares Could you stand beside and see a losing battle How're you traveling up to offer the Lord your prayer
